score_policies.cap_rule: Cap below 60 until dated trade dataset rows, market-access comparison, buyer evidence, and review exist.
score_policies.next_action: Attach dated trade dataset rows and buyer evidence before any market conclusion.
score_policies.purpose: Shows whether a product-country lane deserves deeper validation.

score_policies.cap_rule: Cap below 50 while required packet fields, documents, confirmation, or reviewer evidence are missing.
score_policies.next_action: Collect missing packet fields, confirmed customer documents, and reviewer evidence.
score_policies.purpose: Shows whether packet evidence is complete enough for the current internal stage.

score_policies.cap_rule: Cap below 40 when critical source evidence is stale, reference-only, not checked, or unreviewed.
score_policies.next_action: Refresh official sources, store snapshots, classify changes, and route material changes to review.
score_policies.purpose: Shows whether official/reference source evidence is fresh enough for internal use.

score_policies.cap_rule: Cap below 60 until dated buyer interaction evidence, supplier documents, inspection/certificate evidence, and review exist.
score_policies.next_action: Collect buyer reply/meeting/LOI/PO evidence and supplier registration/product/certificate evidence.
score_policies.purpose: Shows buyer and supplier evidence strength without validation or verification claims.

score_policies.cap_rule: Cap below 40 while importer of record, Incoterms, broker path, or responsibility split are missing.
score_policies.next_action: Confirm importer of record, Incoterms, broker path, freight responsibility, duties, and delivery risk.
score_policies.purpose: Shows whether importer of record, Incoterms, and role split are clear.

score_policies.cap_rule: Cap below 40 while any forbidden external claim, launch gate, payment gate, or qualified-review lane remains blocked.
score_policies.next_action: Resolve claim-gate blockers and reviewer lanes before any stronger customer-visible decision.
score_policies.purpose: Shows whether it is safe to move beyond internal preparation.
